# Casas Vigo

> Furnished rooms for rent in Vigo, Galicia, Spain. 5 flats, 27 rooms, from 300 EUR/month.

## About

Casas Vigo offers furnished rooms for monthly rental in Vigo, the largest city in Galicia, Spain. All rooms include WiFi, utilities, heating, hot water, and access to shared kitchen and common areas. Located in central neighborhoods near the HST train station. Monthly rentals, all-inclusive, perfect for professionals, students, and travelers.

## Properties

- [Rúa Irmandiños Flat](https://elbenxo.github.io/casas-vigo/en/pisos/irmandinhos/) — 4 rooms, 340-380 EUR/month, Casco Urbano
- [Alfonso XIII 1º Derecha](https://elbenxo.github.io/casas-vigo/en/pisos/alfonso-1-derecha/) — 6 rooms, 300-360 EUR/month, near HST Station
- [Alfonso XIII 3º Izquierda](https://elbenxo.github.io/casas-vigo/en/pisos/alfonso-3-izquierda/) — 6 rooms, 300-340 EUR/month, near HST Station
- [Alfonso XIII 4º Derecha Ático](https://elbenxo.github.io/casas-vigo/en/pisos/alfonso-4-derecha-atico/) — 5 rooms, 340-370 EUR/month, Penthouse with terrace
- [Alfonso XIII 4º Izquierda Ático](https://elbenxo.github.io/casas-vigo/en/pisos/alfonso-4-izquierda-atico/) — 2 rooms, 370-400 EUR/month, Attic with skylights

## What's Included

- Furnished room (bed, desk, wardrobe, natural light)
- High-speed WiFi (fibra)
- All utilities (water, electricity, heating)
- Equipped shared kitchen
- Washing machine
- Hot water heating
- Common areas

## Contact

- WhatsApp: Available for inquiries
- Website: https://elbenxo.github.io/casas-vigo/en/contacto/
- Email: Contact via website

## Languages

Available in Spanish (ES), English (EN), and Galician (GL).

## Rental Terms

- Monthly rental (flexible terms)
- All-inclusive price (no hidden fees)
- Furnished and ready to move in
- Central Vigo locations
- Near public transport

## Vigo Family Guide (Things to Do)

Family travel guide for visitors staying in Vigo, especially near Samil beach. Available in 8 languages: [Vigo with kids](https://elbenxo.github.io/casas-vigo/vigo/familias/)

- Samil beach with free seawater pools, playgrounds, Museo do Mar (sea museum + aquarium) and Verbum interactive museum
- Cíes Islands — Atlantic Islands National Park, reached by ferry from Vigo (advance authorization + ticket required)
- In the city: Monte do Castro fortress and views, Castrelos park, VigoNature nature/adventure centre, Marikiná Park treetop adventure, MARCO art museum
- Day trips (<45 min): Baiona and the Pinta caravel replica, A Guarda and the Santa Trega Celtic hillfort, Pontevedra old town, Barosa waterfalls, wild Atlantic horses of Serra da Groba
- Traditional Galician furanchos (seasonal home wineries): Almeriz, Reboraina, Fermín, Villa Preciosa

For complete property data including all room specifications, amenities, and coordinates, see [llms-full.txt](https://elbenxo.github.io/casas-vigo/llms-full.txt)
